gate: all criteria must pass; any failure blocks completion

criteria.statement: Exactly notas.md, hipotesis.md, referencias.md, decision.md are present — not more, not fewer.
Every SKIP file is byte-identical to its pre-run snapshot.
hipotesis.md states a refutable claim or an explicit {HIPOTESIS_POR_DEFINIR} stub.
Every referencias.md entry and non-obvious note carries one Alfa-core tag, one spelling throughout.
decision.md is {POR_CONFIRMAR}; the skill wrote no keep/pivot/kill verdict.
ISO dates, offline, identical inputs produce identical CREATE bytes.
A created vs skipped summary line is emitted.
Single-brand JM Labs; green is never used as a success signal in sample content.
